name: Alester Round Smooth Metal Drink Table Black - Threshold™
description:
Glam up your living space with the Alester Round Smooth Metal Drink Table from Threshold™. Made from metal, this decorative end table features a conical shape with a round tabletop that can be used as a platform to hold your drink or to display various decor items such as a small lamp, potted succulent, souvenir or framed photograph. Brimming with contemporary flair, this metal accent table features a sleek design with a black finish that rounds off your living room decor in style, while the compact construction makes it a great option for smaller spaces.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.

DIMENSIONAL DETAILS
Top Diameter: 8.5"
Top Thickness: 0.37"
Bottom Diameter: 6"
Large Orb Diameter: 2.38"
Small Orb Diameter: 1.75"
Center Rod Thickness: 0.63"
Height: 19.5"
